arts.ttl: I saw Antony take the mick out of his Man United team-mates before club sent him on loan
arts.sum: Despite Antony failing to reach expectations at Manchester United, the Brazilian winger received strong praise from a former Red Devils coach about his talent on show in training

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy has just repeated brutal Ruben Amorim move at Leicester City
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy departed Manchester United the day Ruben Amorim began work as the club's head coach and has now made a similarly ruthless move at Leicester City

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano: 'World-Class' Star Wants to Talk to Man Utd About Summer Move
arts.sum: Manchester United's search for a new striker has had a positive update from Fabrizio Romano

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim has two different Manchester United milestones that offer two different conclusions
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim began his Man Utd reign with a fixture against Ipswich and the Tractor Boys are at Old Trafford tonight for the return game.

arts.ttl: Man Utd face staggering cost if they sack Ruben Amorim thanks to lucrative contract clause
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has endured a difficult start to life at Old Trafford and while his future appears secure for now, he is under pressure to find results

arts.ttl: Man Utd planning post-season matches in Asia
arts.sum: Manchester United are set to play two post-season games in Malaysia and Hong Kong immediately after the Premier League finishes in May.

arts.ttl: Tottenham & Son Heung-min clash over future plans amid Man Utd links
arts.sum: Son Heung-min's long-term future at Tottenham has been clouded in uncertainty.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Ruben Amorim ready to bring £50m winger who plays like Bukayo Saka to Manchester United
arts.sum: TBR Football understands that Sporting CP starlet Geovany Quenda is ready to join Manchester United in the summer. The 17-year-old has been on the Red...

arts.ttl: Man United 'could' use struggling forward 'to land' Napoli goal machine Victor Osimhen this summer
arts.sum: Napoli allegedly want Manchester United forward Rasmus Hojlund amid suggestions that Victor Osimhen could be on his way to Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: 'I was Marcus Rashford's team-mate at Man United – I didn't think he'd make it for one reason'
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has enjoyed a stellar career since bursting onto the scene with Man United at the age of 18, but one former academy teammate initially had his doubts
